workingLanguage.description: Language used for prompts to the user and human-readable artifacts (plan.md, reuse-map.md, STATUS.md).

projectRoot.description: Absolute path to the Angular project root (where angular.json lives).

outputDir.description: Where AAD writes per-feature artifacts (plan / reuse-map / timeline) relative to projectRoot.

ngrxLayout.description: Comma-separated list of NgRx folders the project uses (e.g. 'actions,reducers,effects,services,components,containers,models').

sharedModulesPath.description: Path (relative to projectRoot) where reusable UI modules live.

routesPath.description: Path (relative to projectRoot) where feature modules live.

domainPrefixes.description: Allowed domain prefixes (fl-, ho-, av-, bs-, ...). aad-plan validates feature names against this list.

defaultDomainPrefix.description: Used when /aad-plan is called without an explicit prefix (e.g. 'bs-').

kendoVersion.description: Detected @progress/kendo-angular-grid version. Codegen uses this to pick syntax variants.

angularVersion.description: Detected @angular/core version. Codegen uses this to avoid standalone-component patterns for Angular < 14.

i18nFlow.description: scan-download: team runs `scan:i18n` then `download:i18n` (partners). json-inline: plugin writes directly to src/assets/i18n/*.json.

i18nScanScript.description: npm script name that scans the codebase for i18n keys (e.g. 'scan:i18n').

i18nKeyFile.description: Path (relative to projectRoot) where i18n source keys live, if the project uses a single source file.

path.description: Where component-catalog.json is written relative to projectRoot.

mcpServer.description: Name of the MCP server providing Jira tools (e.g. 'mcp-atlassian').

projectKey.description: Default Jira project key, used when aad-plan receives a bare issue number.

fixturesDir.description: Where captured response JSON files live (relative to projectRoot).

envFlagPath.description: Property path inside environment.ts that toggles mock mode.
